about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: We build
about.subtitle: BotEngineStudio is not just an agency. We create systems that automate, optimize, and grow your business every day.
about.missionText: To help businesses grow faster using AI, automation, and modern design that converts.
about.visionText: To become the new standard for the online presence of modern businesses in Albania and beyond.
about.storyText1: Many businesses lose customers every day for a simple reason: they respond late, lack a professional online presence, and don't use automation.
about.storyText2: We built BotEngineStudio to solve this problem. We combine AI technology with modern design to create systems that work for you 24/7.

values.title: Premium Design
values.text: Websites that build trust and conversion.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Let's talk about
contact.subtitle: Write to us about a website, AI chatbot, or a complete solution for your business. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and we'll contact you to better understand your business needs.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit more about your project or business...
contact.followText: Stay connected with us and see our latest projects and updates.

chatbot.label: CHATBOT SERVICE
chatbot.title: AI Chatbot that
chatbot.subtitle: A personalized chatbot for your business that works 24/7, responds in seconds, and turns visitors into customers without wasting time.
chatbot.whatText: Our chatbot is a virtual assistant trained for your business. It automatically responds to questions, helps customers find the right information, and directs them toward the desired action: order, booking, contact, or lead.
chatbot.previewMsg1: Hello 👋 How can I help you?
chatbot.previewMsg2: I want to know the prices
chatbot.previewMsg3: Of course. Packages start from an initial setup and can be customized for your business.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.text: Customers leave when they don't get an immediate response on DM or the website.

problems.title: Lost Leads
problems.text: Without automation, many visitors leave without leaving contact info and without taking the next step.

problems.title: Repetitive Questions
problems.text: The business wastes time answering the same questions every day.

features: Guide customer toward order or booking
Tone of voice matching your brand

processSteps.title: Business Analysis
processSteps.text: We understand your product, customer questions, and chatbot objectives.

processSteps.title: Build & Training
processSteps.text: We create flows, responses, and logic based on real business scenarios.

processSteps.title: Integration
processSteps.text: We connect the chatbot to the channels where your customers communicate most.

processSteps.title: Launch & Optimization
processSteps.text: We publish the chatbot and improve it based on real usage.

chatbot.ctaText: Get a demo or a personalized offer based on your business, industry, and the channel where you want to implement it.

websiteService.label: WEBSITE SERVICE
websiteService.title: Modern website that
websiteService.subtitle: We build professional websites for businesses, hotels, clinics, landing pages, and e-commerce — with premium design, responsive and structured for results.

types.title: Landing Page
types.text: Focused page for offers, lead capture, and quick conversion.

types.title: Business Website
types.text: Professional online presence for companies, services, and local brands.

types.title: Hotel Website
types.text: Elegant presentation of rooms, services, and reservation options.

types.title: Clinic Website
types.text: Modern page for trust, information, and quick patient contact.

types.title: E-Commerce
types.text: Online store with clear structure for products, offers, and sales.

features: Responsive on phone, tablet, and desktop.
Basic SEO for structure and content.

benefits.title: Design that builds trust
benefits.text: We build websites that look professional and give your business a serious presence.

benefits.title: Responsive on every device
benefits.text: Your page works and looks great on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

benefits.title: Integrated basic SEO
benefits.text: Optimized structure that helps Google understand and index your page.

benefits.title: Forms & integrations
benefits.text: We can add contact form, WhatsApp, and chatbot for more leads.

processSteps.title: Consultation & strategy

processSteps.title: Design & structure
